title: STEAM Expansion Challenge
description: Dive deeper into various STEAM topics! From algebra to quantum mechanics, these 10 questions will put your interdisciplinary knowledge to the test.

questions.questionText: Which property in algebra ensures that a × (b + c) = ab + ac?
questions.explanation: The distributive property allows multiplication to be applied to each term inside the parentheses.

questions.questionText: Which thermodynamic potential is minimized in a system at constant temperature (T) and volume (V)?
questions.explanation: Helmholtz Free Energy (F = U − TS) is the potential that is minimized at constant temperature and volume.

questions.questionText: Which term describes a situation where a machine learning model performs extremely well on training data but poorly on new, unseen data?
questions.explanation: Overfitting occurs when a model learns details and noise in the training data to the extent that it negatively impacts its performance on unseen data.

questions.questionText: Which type of galaxy is characterized by a flat, rotating disk containing spiral arms and often a central bulge?
questions.explanation: Spiral galaxies feature prominent, curving arms in a disk, often with a bright central nucleus or bulge.

questions.questionText: Which measure of central tendency is found by summing all the values in a dataset and then dividing by the number of values?
questions.explanation: The mean (arithmetic average) is calculated by adding all observations and dividing by the total count.

questions.questionText: Which principle states that certain pairs of physical properties, like position and momentum, cannot both be known to arbitrary precision simultaneously?
questions.explanation: Heisenberg's Uncertainty Principle says one cannot determine both the position and momentum of a particle with perfect accuracy at the same time.

questions.questionText: Which analytical method separates ions or molecules based on their mass-to-charge ratio (m/z)?
questions.explanation: Mass spectrometry sorts ions by their mass-to-charge ratio, allowing precise analysis of molecular composition.

questions.questionText: Which of Maxwell's equations (in integral form) states that the line integral of the magnetic field B around a closed loop equals μ₀ times the enclosed current?
questions.explanation: Ampère's Law, in integral form, asserts ∮B·dl = μ₀I_enc (plus the displacement current term in Maxwell’s complete form).

questions.questionText: Which quantity remains constant for a rigid body experiencing uniform circular motion if no external torque is applied?
questions.explanation: With no external torque, the angular momentum of the rotating body remains constant.

questions.questionText: Which angle measure in radians is equivalent to 180°?

rewards.description: Earn 750 points for completing this STEAM Expansion Challenge!
